name: UT-2004
author: tlearm15@github

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Install script for UT2004 dedicated server

#update apt repos and install required utilities
apt update
apt install -y wget tar xz-utils pv

#Create server dir
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

# Download the server from linuxgsm
wget http://linuxgsm.download/UnrealTournament2004/ut2004-server-3369-3-ultimate-linux.tar.xz --show-progress -O "server.tar.xz"

# Extract and remove tar, using pv to display status
echo "Extracting server tarball (may take a while)"
pv server.tar.xz | tar -xJ
echo "Extraction Complete"
rm server.tar.xz

# Ensure the binary is executable
chmod +x System/ucc-bin

# Updates masterserver in default.ini to connect to new master server
cd /mnt/server/System
sed -i 's/.*ut2004master1.epicgames.com.*/MasterServerList=(Address="utmaster.openspy.net",Port=28902)/' Default.ini
sed -i 's/DoUplink=False/DoUplink=True/g' Default.ini
#enables webserver
sed -i "s/bEnabled=False/bEnabled=True/g" Default.ini
sed -i "s/ListenPort=80/ListenPort=1028/g" Default.ini

touch /mnt/server/System/cdkey
# Use generic CDKEY to avoid issues
echo "SRVER-3Y9AC-FDRKE-YKDW7" > /mnt/server/System/cdkey

variables.name: Server Port
variables.description:
The port used for the server.

The game allocates other ports based on this choice, eg.

Game Port:  7777

crt Port: 7787

To ensure the server works please assign the additional ports accordingly.

Webserver is also enabled on port 1028, to allow for easier server management locally.
